base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tektite_jump — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Tektite — spider-like 4-legged creature. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tektite — spider-like 4-legged creature; 2-frame jump cycle; hops erratically on mountain paths
